SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AnimationFrames
Represents a sequence of animation frames used by an AnimationPlayer.
AnimationPlayer
Handles playnig an animatin - framing timing, looping and keeps track of which frame we are on
AnimationState
Represents a single animation "state" the pet can be in.
AnimationStateMachine
Handles which animation state the pet is currently in.
AnimationTestWindow
 
animStates
Holds all the different animation states the pet can switch between.
AuthController
 
BreakController
Controller class for handling button interactions in the Pomodoro Work Session UI.
DatabaseConnection
Utility class for managing SQLite database connections.
DatabaseInitialiser
Utility class responsible for initializing the application's database schema and seeding initial data.
DesktopPet
A JavaFX application that displays a draggable desktop pet on the screen.
loadImages
Utility class for loading animation frame sequences from the resources folder.
LocalAIQuestionGenerator
Generates trivia questions using a local Ollama model and stores them in the trivia database.
LocalAIQuestionGenerator.GeneratedQuestion
 
Login
 
Main
Entry point for the JavaFX Trivia Game application.
MainController
Controller for the main Trivia Game interface.
MockAuthController
 
Pet
JavaFX class responsible for managing the different animation states for the pet when idling or after an action is taken.
PetController
Controller class for all interactions for the menu and the companion pet.
Pomodoro
JavaFX Application class responsible for launching and configuring scenes in the Pomodoro timer application.
PomodoroController
The Main Controller Manages Timer, Progress bar, TableView, Session DAO and CRUD logic in the Pomodoro application.
Question
Represents a trivia question with four multiple-choice options and the correct answer.
QuestionsSeeder
Utility class responsible for populating the questions table with initial data.
ScoreDAO
Data Access Object for managing user scores in the database.
Session
Custom data model class for a Pomodoro Session.
SessionDAO
Data Access Object for managing the CRUD operations of Session Data Connects to the Sqlite database vis DBConnection Class Allows for persistent storage of Pomodoro Session Data
SimpleAnimationState
A super lightweight animation state.
Trivia
Main entry point for the Trivia game application.
User
 
UserDAO
 
UserSingleton
User Singleton class Stores the Username and User_ID for access across other controller in a UserSingleton Class Simulates an "Active" User across all the stages
WorkController
Controller class for handling button interactions in the Pomodoro Work Session UI.
